notes:
- Multi-user: install now auto-adds Content/Python/UEFNBridge/ to the project's .gitignore/.p4ignore, so the bridge's runtime files stop causing source-control conflicts between teammates.
- Runner counts rule-gated jobs as refused, separate from real failures (e.g. 3 done, 2 failed, 5 refused).
- Contract section 8 now documents where AI jobs should write output files: log() or the bridge work folder, never the AI's home dir.
- Includes the v1.7 Copy AI Prompt improvement.

Special notes: PAYLOAD_VERSION bumped to 1.3-bridge, so each project will show "Update Bridge Payload" once after updating the app. Existing projects that already committed the bridge folder may still need to untrack it once by hand.
